title: potentilla tormentilla var. sciaphila
intro: Potentilla tormentilla var. sciaphila, also known as Black Potentilla or Tormentil, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and astringent roots. The medicinal properties of Potentilla tormentilla var. sciaphila lie in its roots, which contain tannins and other compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and ulcers, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditionally, Potentilla tormentilla var. sciaphila is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal capsules and tablets to harness its medicinal properties.
